---
title: "not a bug: make sure the system works and runs properly before working on the capstone"
labels: not a bug, required
---

**Phase 1 — Set up your system for success (required).**

Make sure the system works and runs properly before working on the capstone. Ensure
that you don't runt into errors when you lock in. Set yourself up for success by making sure
that you can run the system and that it works as expected. 

### Tasks
- [ ] Create a new database titled 'grocerystore'
- [ ] Connect to the database using your credentials
- [ ] Run the system and make sure it works
- [ ] If not, find and fix the cause so you can begin on the **Capstone**
- [ ] to confirm if the system works, run http://localhost:8080/products it should display a list of products

### Done when
- You get the system working and running properly, displaying a list of products
